name: Thunderbolt
description:
⭐ | quiet on the set.

Heh, me? Now there’s a question. As the star of my show, I have perhaps the biggest responsibility of all: making sure each and every episode keeps viewers on the edge of their seats, which I’ve been doing *flawlessly* for some time now. Now, would I make it as a *real* hero? Well... actually, I might, especially after my big adventure with my little friend (and *better* sidekick) Patch, here. He helped me realize that this isn’t just another gig – it’s a responsibility. One I’m proud to uphold.
creator: HwoahlyShite
